words.context: A consonant is a speech sound that cannot be sung.
Vowel – гласный звук. How do you spell that? It's v-o-w-e-l.
A semi vowel is a sound which is similar to a vowel, but functions as a consonant. The words yes and well in English start with semi vowels.
Will. W-i-l-l. Would. The spelling is w-o-u-l-d.

words.russian: был(а, ет) бы (были(и, е), были(и, е))
words.context: Would. The spelling is w-o-u-l-d.
With. W-i-t-h.
As. Well. As. As well as.
W-very. W-well. Very. Well.
«Although» – это стресс на втором слове.
Трифтонг. Трифтонг – это комбинация трех звуков в том же слове. Есть пять трифтонгов в английском.
Inspiring – I-N-S-P-I-R-I-N-G.
Vowel. Ауа. Vowel. И это слово переводится как… классный.
Палат – это мягкая нёба, вверху, внутри муку.

«thanks» Следующее слово «language»

Возвращение вилор-концидента, и, пожалуйста, обрежьте или подключите звук «n». Итак, это слово N в «think», комбинация N и K дает звук «nk».
«being able to»
Please write down the phrase Oriental languages. How do you spell Oriental? It's O-R-I-E-N-T-A-L.
Please write down Chinese characters. How do you spell that? It's capital C-H-I-N-E-S-E. And characters C-H-A-R-A-C-T-E-R-S.
Write down prior to the preposition. How do you spell prior to? The spelling is P-R-I-O-R and the second word is to-T-O. Write the translation. Перед или до.

Write down the verb to prioritize. How do you spell prioritize? The spelling is P-R-I-O-R-I-T-I-Z-E. Also note the British spelling. It's spelled with an S at the end in British English. So prioritize T-I-S-E and the American spelling is Z-E at the end.
The noun priority is something very important that needs attention first.
Prior means previous or earlier in time. It's an adjective. The preposition prior to means before a particular time or event.
The body paragraphs present the main points of an essay, and each one explains and argues one aspect of the thesis statement.
Please write down the definition as well. They give specific information about the main idea.
The topic sentence states one aspect of the thesis, telling readers what the paragraph is about.
The supporting sentences give specific information about the main idea, presenting details, examples, explanations, facts and arguments.
The table or pie chart with the survey results shows five types of something or five ways of doing something.
The survey data reveal Note that in English the word data is actually plural, данные, which is why the proper form is reveal and not reveals. However, reveals is also acceptable.

Analyzing the survey data, it becomes evident that the number of responses for the option to show appreciation for other cultures is significantly greater than the number of responses for the option to reflect on one's own cultural identity at 49% and 4% respectively.

words.russian: впечатляющая разница в цифрах, значительная разница между опциями
words.context: A striking difference in figures. And you may add between some of the options or between the groups of respondents.

words.russian: значительный разрыв в числах, значительная разница между опциями
words.context: A substantial gap in the numbers. How do you spell substantial? It's spelled as S-U-B-S-T-A-N-T-I-A-L.
Write down words for number 15. The spelling is P-E-R-C-E-N-T Percent.
Next, write down percentage. The spelling is P-E-R-C-E-N-T-A-G-E. And in parentheses. Letter S. Indicating that it does have a plural form. Percentages.
Write down the definition for percentage points. They are used to indicate the difference between two percentages.
Listen and repeat. Significantly more responses and significantly fewer responses. Note the use of the word responses.
Listen and repeat. Significantly more responses and significantly fewer responses. Note the use of the word responses.
Number eighteen. Eighteen. Listen and repeat. The fewest responses. Note the use of the word fewest. Response is a countable noun, so we need to use fewest.
Here's a synonymous expression. The greatest number of responses and the smallest number of responses.
Here's a synonymous expression. The greatest number of responses and the smallest number of responses.
The opposite of substantially is slightly.
Some good synonyms for substantially are significantly and considerably. A good synonym for slightly is somewhat.
A good synonym for slightly is somewhat. Somewhat means only to a small degree or insignificantly.
The option that has gained the most responses is to show appreciation for other cultures with 49% of the total. This option has received the greatest number of responses.
To reflect on one's cultural identity is the option that has received the fewest responses. At 4%, this option has received significantly fewer responses as compared to the option discussed above.
The number of responses for the first option is greater than that of the second option.
If the word was plural such as numbers or responses, then you could substitute it with those of.
To reflect means to throw back light, heat, sound or an image. And the figurative meaning is to think carefully about something, to reflect on something.
The adjective reflective means thinking deeply or carefully about something.
A reflection of something. Write down the translation. Отражение, а также размышление.
Drawbacks. Merits and drawbacks.
Each type of activity has its merits and drawbacks.
Both types of activity have their pros and cons, or they have their pluses and minuses.
They each have their pluses and minuses.
Each type of activity has its merits and drawbacks.
An advantage of in-person group classes is that you do things together with other students in the same room.
Enhances engagement and motivation.

As for the positive aspects of in-person group classes.
An advantage of in-person group classes is that you do things together with other students in the same room.
The special atmosphere and face-to-face communication make learning more motivating and fun.
The special atmosphere and face-to-face communication make learning more motivating and fun.
I'd point out that participating in group activities in a shared physical space enhances engagement and motivation.
An advantage of in-person group classes is that you do things together with other students in the same room.

Another possible drawback is that online interaction is subject to periodic, unpredicted disruptions, which may negatively impact the learning process.

words.russian: предусмотреть, обеспечить место либо возможность для чего-либо
words.context: To allow for something. To allow for means to consider or to think about something when planning.
Flexible is an adjective. The adverb is flexibly. Flexibly means in a way that can change or adapt easily.
The adverb is flexibly. Flexibly means in a way that can change or adapt easily.
The noun is flexibility. And the expression is a flexible approach. A flexible schedule.
A flexible approach is a way of doing things that can change to meet different needs.
A flexible schedule is a plan or timetable that can change or be moved to fit different situations.
Convenient means easy to use or helpful. Inconvenient means not easy to use or causing problems.
Inconvenient means not easy to use or causing problems.
The adverb, conveniently, means in a way that is easy or helpful.
A convenience, the noun, is something that makes life easier or more comfortable.

words.russian: специальное оборудование или помещение, объекты, инфраструктуры
words.context: Convenience facilities are services or equipment that make a place comfortable. And a convenience store is a small shop where you can buy everyday things near home.
